_meta.description: Design tokens shaped to resemble a Gluestack v5 config.ts theme object. Mirrors tokens.css 1:1 — same provenance markers apply. See handoff.md before wiring these into `createConfig()`.
_meta.source: Figma file 'Activities Design Kit_based on GlueStack UI', node Dashboard_01 (14756:9246)

provenance.confirmed: value read directly from a named Figma variable used on this screen
provenance.observed: value read from generated layer code, not bound to a named Figma variable
provenance.assumed: not present in this screen; filled in from Gluestack v5 defaults for scale completeness

primary100.note: "Primary/primary100" — Solicitar Asistencia calendar weekday header letters

accentYellow.note: invented — no Figma source this pass. Login screen's arrow-badge accent, deliberately brighter than tertiary500 to read as a CTA accent rather than the existing muted food gold.

tertiary500.note: breakfast/food icon accent; allergen chip checkmarks

alertPeach.note: Asistencia tray alert background, no named Figma variable. The 'lavender' action-row background is already covered by secondary0 — no new token needed for it.

moodHappy.note: invented — no Figma source for the report screen at all, matched to the reference screenshot

moodNeutral.note: = tertiary500, reused rather than adding a near-duplicate amber

moodSad.note: invented — no Figma source for the report screen at all, matched to the reference screenshot

successBackground.note: "success/success-background" — Solicitar Asistencia contratado + today cell fill

success200.note: "success/success200" — legend dot ONLY, a 3rd distinct green from the two above

rawSuccessText.note: no named Figma variable — contratado cell number text, a 4th distinct green

error100.note: "error/error100" — legend dot ONLY, distinct from the cell colors above

rawWeekendBg.note: no named Figma variable — matches Tailwind's default slate-50

rawWeekendText.note: no named Figma variable — matches Tailwind's default slate-400

modalBackdrop.note: same primary500-at-80% as the Asistencia tray backdrop, given its own named token per instruction

typography0.note: near-white text/icon fill on saturated fills

typographyBlack.note: raw fallback baked into some source SVG icons

backgroundCard.note: "Background/background0", Menú Semanal card surface — a DIFFERENT white than backgroundSurface above. See handoff.md.

error500.note: OFF-SYSTEM: sourced in Figma as 'New palette/Default/Primary/Primary1', a token from a different library (used on the header notification-count badge, which also uses a non-Poppins font). Recommend rebuilding that badge on a proper Gluestack Badge + error token rather than reusing this raw value. See handoff.md.

danger.note: = error500, semantic alias for Gestión's "Cerrar sesión" row — reused per instruction rather than adding a near-duplicate red.

rawDayLabel.note: no named Figma variable at all — Menú Semanal day-selector weekday letter

rawDayNumber.note: no named Figma variable at all — Menú Semanal day-selector date number (inactive) and date heading

rawDishName.note: no named Figma variable at all — meal card dish name text

rawCeliacBg.note: no named Figma variable at all — "Menú Celiacos" card background

rawCeliacHeading.note: no named Figma variable at all — "Menú Celiacos" heading text

md.note: "Border radius/md" — Asistencia tray icon frame + alert box

xl.note: card corners — NOT a distinct Figma radius variable, the source file reuses space.3 (12px) for this. Flagged for design-system cleanup.

alt.note: the 👋 glyph run in the Home greeting, and the "Consultar informe" button label on Menú Semanal — off-system relative to the Poppins-based scale

daySelector.note: off-system — Menú Semanal's weekday/date selector uses a 3rd font family entirely. See handoff.md

heading-sm.note: distinct from text-semibold-md despite same 16px size — used for the student's name

heading-md.note: Solicitar Asistencia calendar month label — a Bold 18px style, distinct from Menú Semanal's raw Semibold-18 date heading

36.note: one-off, institution logo footer — not a named token in Figma

50.note: one-off, student sub-label text — not a named token in Figma

soft.note: not a named Figma variable — the weekly day-selector's own shadow on Menú Semanal, lighter than hard5
